summary: Added a Thread Nexus panel that turns agents, lanes, thread ids, blockers, staged commands, and top asks into a visual bot ownership network with direct path, comms, and staging controls.

queries: network graph dashboard UX team coordination status cards best practices
agent dashboard thread management UI pattern command center
node link diagram dashboard visualizing relationships UX
pattern_notes: Operational dashboards should prioritize glanceable status, focused drill-down, and clear actions over decorative density.
Mission-control style agent surfaces benefit from showing ownership, progress, and command readiness together.
Node-link diagrams are useful when relationship structure is the important question, but need accompanying details for exact status and next actions.
AI agent interfaces should expose context, trust state, and human control points rather than hiding orchestration behind generic chat.

ui_contract: Render Thread Nexus between the Dispatch Console and Bot Command Matrix.
Show one network node per command record, with active, ready, gated, and staged visual states.
Show a central Atlas relay hub connected to every bot node.
Show aggregate counts for ready bots, gated bots, staged commands, and open asks.
Show the selected bot focus card with lane, thread id, level, status, blockers, top ask, and quick controls.
PATH opens the selected lane's Path Map, COM opens the selected lane's command deck, and Q stages the suggested command.
Show a top-ask queue that can jump directly to the related lane overview.
The panel is local-only; it does not send external messages, start workers, or perform account actions.

checks: 390x920 viewport: Thread Nexus rendered 11 nodes, 11 links, 1 column, no horizontal overflow, no offscreen nodes, no console errors, and no failed responses.
1280x800 viewport: Thread Nexus rendered 11 nodes, 11 links, 2 columns, active selected node, 7 gated nodes, 4 queue items, no horizontal overflow, and no failed responses.
1280x800 interaction: PATH changed the route to #lane=platform_engineering&view=path and rendered Path Map.
1280x800 interaction: COM changed the route to #lane=platform_engineering&view=comms and rendered the command deck.
1280x800 interaction: Q changed the dispatch count from 0 staged to 1 staged, marked 1 Thread Nexus node as staged and gated, and marked 1 Bot Command Matrix card as staged.
1600x900 viewport: Thread Nexus rendered 11 nodes, 11 links, 2 columns, no horizontal overflow, no offscreen nodes, no console errors, and no failed responses.
